## What happened?
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
A clear and concise description of actually happened.

## Page URL
The exact URL of the page you were on.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Versions
- Extension: eg. v1.0.0
- Browser (optional): eg. Google Chrome 146.0.7680.165 (Official Build) (64-bit)
- Device (optional): eg. Ubuntu 24.04.1

## Additional context
Anything else you think is important. Or what you had for lunch for that matters.
